dimensions.description: Clear acrylic display case ~30cm tall x ~16cm wide x ~16cm deep; figure inside ~25cm tall, hands raised holding small accessories.

materials.name: acrylic_case
materials.notes: Clear acrylic; transmission=1.0, IOR=1.49, slight surface microroughness for soft reflections

materials.name: skin_tan
materials.notes: Matte vinyl skin tone, no specular sheen

materials.name: hair_black
materials.notes: Solid black hair sculpt with chunky strands

materials.name: hair_tip_tan
materials.notes: Lighter accent tips on outer ends of hair strands

lighting.key_light: Top-front-right area light, ~600x600 mm, energy ~800 W, color 5600 K
lighting.fill_light: Top-front-left area light, ~800x800 mm, energy ~250 W, color 5600 K — wraps shadows
lighting.rim_light: None in reference (catalog product shot, near-shadowless)
lighting.environment: Bright soft white softbox HDRI (~strength 1.5) for very even ambient illumination, cyc-style background
lighting.notes: Pure white seamless. Reference photo has near-zero hard shadow on the acrylic — wide softbox + bounce.

camera.position: Slight 3/4 from front-left, eye-level, ~0.6 m from subject
camera.focal_length: 85mm equivalent, slight low-angle to read the case top
camera.depth_of_field: Stopped down — everything in focus from front edge of case to back wall (f/8 equivalent)
camera.notes: Catalog framing — figure fills ~80% of vertical frame inside the case

extraction.scene_notes: Stylized male vinyl figure inside clear rectangular acrylic display case. Figure has black spiky hair with tan tips, single visible large eye, red scarf, white shirt + black tie + black blazer + black pants + black/white sneakers. Hands raised holding small accessories. Pure white seamless studio backdrop, near-shadowless soft lighting.

seed_parameters.SCENE_DESCRIPTION: Stylized male vinyl figure inside clear rectangular acrylic display case. Figure has black spiky hair with tan tips, single visible large eye, red scarf, white shirt + black tie + black blazer + black pants + black/white sneakers. Hands raised holding small accessories. Pure white seamless studio backdrop, near-shadowless soft lighting.

missing_keys: Inferred key light angle from description: Top-front-right area light, ~600x600 mm, energy ~800 W, color 5600 K
